comment: Synthetic limited-stage SCLC, female 62, heavy ex-smoker, ECOG 1, disease confined to right hemithorax encompassable in single tolerable RT field, no distant metastases, brain MRI clear. CLINICAL TARGET: IND-SCLC-LIMITED-1L (REG-EP-CONCURRENT-RT-SCLC-LIMITED, CONVERT 60 Gy once-daily, mOS ~27 mo). KB-DRIFT NOTE 1: ALGO-SCLC-1L step 1 evaluates a free-text 'Limited-stage' condition with no matching disease-scoped RedFlag; the algorithm itself flags this in its notes ('Flag for RF authoring'). Engine therefore cannot detect limited stage from findings and falls through to default IND-SCLC-EXTENSIVE-1L (durvalumab/CASPIAN); IND-SCLC-LIMITED-1L surfaces as alternative-track for HCP consideration. KB-DRIFT NOTE 2 (CHARTER §17): radiotherapy is not modellable in current schema — REG-EP-CONCURRENT-RT-SCLC-LIMITED references concurrent thoracic RT in its name/notes but RT itself is not a structured Drug component, so the rendered Plan surfaces only the chemo backbone (etoposide+platinum). The case is published to make both gaps visible to KB authors and tumor-board reviewers.
